info.name: Store Features API
info.description: Postman/Apidog collection for Store Features API endpoints. All endpoints are public (no authentication required).

header.description: Language code: en or ar (optional, defaults to en)

query.description: Number of items per page (optional, default: 15)

request.description:
Get all store features.

**Authentication:** Not required (public endpoint)

**Query Parameters (all optional):**
- `per_page`: Number of items per page (default: 15)

**Response includes:**
- Paginated list of store features
- Each feature includes: id, name (translated), name_en, name_ar, description (translated), description_en, description_ar, image, timestamps

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Store features fetched successfully",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "name": "Fast Delivery",

            "description": "We deliver your orders quickly and efficiently to your doorstep.",

            "updated_at": "2025-12-08T11:29:36.000000Z"
        },
        {
            "id": 2,
            "name": "Secure Payment",
            "name_en": "Secure Payment",
            "name_ar": "دفع آمن",
            "description": "Your payment information is protected with the latest security standards.",
            "description_en": "Your payment information is protected with the latest security standards.",
            "description_ar": "معلومات الدفع الخاصة بك محمية بأحدث معايير الأمان.",
            "image": "http://localhost:8000/storage/assets/images/features/secure-payment.svg",
            "created_at": "2025-12-08T11:29:36.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2025-12-08T11:29:36.000000Z"
        },
        {
            "id": 3,
            "name": "Quality Products",
            "name_en": "Quality Products",
            "name_ar": "منتجات عالية الجودة",
            "description": "We offer only the best quality products from trusted suppliers.",
            "description_en": "We offer only the best quality products from trusted suppliers.",
            "description_ar": "نوفر فقط أفضل المنتجات عالية الجودة من موردين موثوقين.",
            "image": "http://localhost:8000/storage/assets/images/features/quality-products.svg",
            "created_at": "2025-12-08T11:29:36.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2025-12-08T11:29:36.000000Z"
        }

    "pagination": {
        "current_page": 1,
        "per_page": 15,
        "total": 6,
        "last_page": 1,
        "from": 1,
        "to": 6
    }
}

header.description: Language code: en or ar (optional, defaults to en)

request.description:
Get a single store feature by ID.

**Authentication:** Not required (public endpoint)

**Path Parameters:**
- `id` (integer, required): The store feature ID

**Response includes:**
- Store feature details: id, name (translated), name_en, name_ar, description (translated), description_en, description_ar, image, timestamps

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Store feature fetched successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Fast Delivery",
        "name_en": "Fast Delivery",

        "description": "We deliver your orders quickly and efficiently to your doorstep.",
        "description_en": "We deliver your orders quickly and efficiently to your doorstep.",
        "description_ar": "نوصل طلباتك بسرعة وكفاءة إلى باب منزلك.",

        "created_at": "2025-12-08T11:29:36.000000Z",

    }
}
